entities.name: ASPERGILLUS GENUS
entities.description: A genus of fungi including species such as A. nidulans, A. fumigatus, A. oryzae, and A. flavus

entities.name: A. NIDULANS
entities.description: A species within the Aspergillus genus

entities.name: A. FUMIGATUS
entities.description: A species within the Aspergillus genus

entities.name: A. ORYZAE
entities.description: A species within the Aspergillus genus

entities.name: A. FLAVUS
entities.description: A species within the Aspergillus genus known for aflatoxin production and pathogenicity

entities.name: NRRL3357
entities.description: An isolate of A. flavus characterized as a MAT1-1, moderate aflatoxin producer with lower stress tolerance

entities.name: AF13
entities.description: An isolate of A. flavus characterized as a MAT1-2, highly stress tolerant, and highly aflatoxigenic

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The biological process of producing aflatoxins

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: An environmental condition that can exacerbate aflatoxin production in A. flavus

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a fungal isolate to withstand adverse environmental conditions

entities.name: MAT1-1
entities.description: A mating type marker associated with the NRRL3357 isolate

entities.name: MAT1-2
entities.description: A mating type marker associated with the AF13 isolate

entities.name: PACBIO LONG-READ SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing technology used to create reference grade genome assemblies

entities.name: OPTICAL MAPPING
entities.description: A technique used to provide structural genomic information to improve assembly quality

entities.name: COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of comparing genomic data between different isolates or species

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of determining the biological function of specific genes or genomic regions

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of evolutionary relationships among biological entities

entities.name: 310 KB INSERTION
entities.description: A unique genomic insertion of 310 kilobases containing 58 genes found in isolate AF13

entities.name: ATFC
entities.description: A bZIP transcription factor located within the 310 Kb insertion that may influence pathogenicity and stress tolerance

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY
entities.description: The ability of a fungus to cause disease in a host

entities.name: PHYLOGENOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis combining phylogenetics and genomics to study species complexes

entities.name: POLYPHYLY
entities.description: The state of a group of organisms not sharing a single common ancestor
